application.name: EnterpriseMdmSolution
application.description: Enterprise MDM solution for Customer, Material and Vendor master data

summaries.label: Average customer sales area credit limit
Maximum customer sales area credit limit

profiling.description: Only meaningful configured summaries are generated; no blanket property profiling.

dataQualityRules.message: CustomerTax.ValidTo cannot be earlier than ValidFrom.
Customer.CountryId must refer to an existing Country.
Customer.CurrencyId must refer to an existing Currency.
CustomerAddress.CustomerId must refer to an existing Customer.
CustomerAddress.CountryId must refer to an existing Country.
CustomerContact.CustomerId must refer to an existing Customer.

CustomerSalesArea.SalesOrganizationId must refer to an existing SalesOrganization.
CustomerSalesArea.PaymentTermId must refer to an existing PaymentTerm.
CustomerTax.CustomerId must refer to an existing Customer.
CustomerTax.CountryId must refer to an existing Country.
CustomerClassification.CustomerId must refer to an existing Customer.
CustomerCreditProfile.CustomerId must refer to an existing Customer.
CustomerPartnerFunction.CustomerId must refer to an existing Customer.
CustomerAttachment.CustomerId must refer to an existing Customer.

dataQualityRules.ruleName: Indian active customer must have GST tax number
dataQualityRules.message: Indian active customer must have a GST tax number.

dataQualityRules.ruleName: Customer credit exposure should not exceed credit limit
dataQualityRules.message: Credit exposure cannot exceed credit limit.

dataQualityRules.ruleName: Potential Duplicate Customer by Name and Address
dataQualityRules.description: Identify potential duplicate customers using weighted fuzzy customer name and address matching.
dataQualityRules.message: Potential duplicate customer found by weighted name and address matching.

analysisIntent.description: Profiling and data quality generation is explicit-only. Entity definitions remain schema-focused; only configured profiling summaries and data quality rules are generated.
